name: Meta: Ultimate 30vol
description: The best risk-adjusted 30vol strategies across all signal types: AAA Top-3 30vol (Sharpe 8.8, low DD), Mean Reversion 30vol (Sharpe 7.1), Momentum Top-3 30vol (Sharpe 6.4), AAA Full Universe 30vol (Sharpe 6.0, lowest DD at -5.7%), and HRP Commodity Theme 30vol (Sharpe 5.4). Combines adaptive, contrarian, momentum, and risk-based signals at the 30% vol budget level.
